texts.pageTitle: EMP PARTS CO., LTD. | Engineering Machinery Parts
texts.heroBadge: Official Isuzu Authorized Distributor Since 2012  |  Top Selling Agent 2024
texts.heroSub: Engineering Machinery Parts · Repuestos para Maquinaria
texts.heroDesc: China's premier supplier of genuine Isuzu OEM parts and engineering machinery components. Established 2002 · Serving Latin America, Southeast Asia, Russia and 50+ countries.
texts.isuzuBody: Since 2012, EMP PARTS has been the official authorized distributor of Isuzu Genuine Parts - the only Chinese company simultaneously holding all three Isuzu parts distribution certifications. Full OEM documentation and factory-direct pricing for all models.
texts.facilityBody: Strategic warehouse locations ensure fast response and reliable supply for global clients. Total inventory exceeds $14 million USD.
texts.loc3detail: 2,000 m² · Genuine Parts · Direct Port Access
texts.videosDesc: Company introduction, facility tours and product demonstrations.
texts.downloadsBody: Download our latest product catalogues, certification documents, and company profiles.
